description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure dressed in a military-style uniform with a belted tunic, trousers, and tall boots. The figure's arms are unusually elongated and stretched outward, with the sleeves of the uniform extending far beyond the natural reach, creating a dramatic and surreal appearance. The hands are visible at the ends of the extended sleeves, and the figure's posture is rigid and upright. The head features short, neatly combed hair, and the facial expression is neutral. The overall look is reminiscent of early-to-mid 20th-century military attire, with exaggerated anatomical proportions for artistic effect.
description: A stylized adult male in a military uniform with dramatically elongated, outstretched arms and a rigid upright posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, belted tunic, and both arms stretched widely outward with extended sleeves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the uniform's side, and the extreme length of the left arm and sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the uniform, the back of the head, and both arms fully extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the right side of the uniform, and the right arm's exaggerated extension.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style belted tunic and trousers with tall boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms dramatically outstretched
